design_note: design.md rev 2 (obs 889): additive, 8 touchpoints 0 deviations, 7 create + 18 modify (+context.ts in rev 2). ADRs: 0039 NEW (fail-loud rejection) + amendments 0037 (WeakSet dialect-error module, isContained discriminator, mutation-gated #ensureOpen, fail-closed + cross-handle poison flag on RunContext, row-145, leak constraint), 0010 (withOps eager collision incl base.ops + reserved names, compose-time prefix 'op-pack composition failed: ', deliberately NOT WeakSet-branded), 0012 (conformance tail: sample injection, real-base runtime structural probe, leaf document-as-limit + FIT-01; deepEqual + dialect-error module home fold). Rev-2 fixes from council diff: prefix-matching discriminator REPLACED by WeakSet brand (blind architect+security convergence; FIT-08 misreading resolved — it bans re-exports, ops.ts imports dialectError legally); DG-07.3 poison flag ADOPTED (spec 'MUST NOT be attempted' literal; new fitness guard context->dialect-handle no-edge needs red-proof fixture); sentinel-leak + registry-guard + JSDoc-disambiguation test rows; DAS-01.1 flip = extend positive + DELETE negative; final message wordings pinned; archive staleness obligations (index.ts:31 + dialect-authoring-standards 'thin' prose). KEY design finding validated by orchestrator vs spec: mutation-gated #ensureOpen is REQUIRED (flush-time drop would violate signed REQ-TSD-08.6 one-modify-equals-seed); cost = per-op probe print (bounded, relaxes ADR-0006) — steward foresight CQ candidate. Poison flag is best-effort under microtask races; drain allSettled backstop holds zero-batches regardless — apply-time interleaving test noted.

propose_note: Proposal persisted (engram obs 887 + proposal.md). Intent carries over-claim guard (non-destructive structured edits, 3-of-4 families). 6 delivery groups, 4 modified capabilities, risk Medium. Council: BA capabilities contract C1-C9 + R1-R8 spec risks (R4 collision-semantics asymmetry strongest, R5 cut-lever REQ-ID separability); PM slice preview skeleton+6 at L ceiling, reckoning bar = pain-typed AND generality-proven (S-D collision + S-F conformance tail NON-cuttable, only S-C addVariable/addClass safe cut), ledger traps (prune deferral needs NEW pending row or vanishes at archive; line 37 zombie; line 76 ossification watch); ARCHITECT: row-136 guard = same pendingSnapshot predicate as #ensureOpen inside enqueued modify step, asymmetric (only AST-open->raw-modify throws; read-drain is the natural escape); contained-invoke helper #invokeContained on controller routing runOp+runRaw; ADR discipline = 1 new + 3 amendments (0037 covers BOTH 136+137; 0010 collision; 0012 tail) — amend-don't-mint keeps tripwire safe; collision posture SETTLED technically: runtime throw EAGER at withOps mandatory (kit any-erasure evaporates type checks; runtime test can't red-prove compile error), type-level optional; leaf rule lean = document-as-limit (in-memory run-vehicle is not a static analyzer); deepEqual home = src/core unmapped. CONFLICT FOUND (architect, HIGH): orchestrator-worded ruling #3 'throw AuthoringError' contradicts the row-141 split that deferred AuthoringError union promotion OUT — recommend dialectError (frozen prefix, seam vocabulary); owner must reconcile before spec pins the message. DISSENT recorded: propose-architect endorses 2 shipped packs on cohesion grounds (blind to ruling rationale); ruling #4 stands (one pack + fixture) — fixture is needed for the runtime red-proof either way.
explore_note: ready_for_proposal yes; 0 arch deviations (8 touchpoints all aligns). Row 136 confirmed LIVE silent data loss today (runModify bypasses AST coalescing, raw write wins, zero tests). Row 137 confirmed: runOp has NO containment sync OR async (security headline — broader than row's async-only wording). Collision diagnostic needs >=2-pack topology or honest re-deferral (ADR-0010/REQ-DG-02.2). Row 136 (modify-after-AST LWW) = mandatory design input.
